response.justification: Wei Chen demonstrates extensive experience in full-stack development, with 6+ years of relevant roles and a strong track record in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and related technologies. His work in AI-agent infrastructure and diverse backend services (Kotlin/Java) aligns well with the role's requirements. His contributions to open-source projects and community engagement further validate his technical depth and collaborative mindset. Minor concerns include limited direct experience with Nest.js and Vitest, but his adaptability and breadth of experience mitigate this.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, matching primary stack requirements
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP code generators
Strong problem-solving and architectural skills demonstrated through open-source projects and diverse technical contributions
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js (primary backend framework), though Kotlin/Java experience is relevant
No explicit mention of Vitest (testing framework), though Jest and Playwright are referenced
Gaps in continuous employment (e.g., recent job change) may require clarification
